translations.en: a tall, rather well dressed man with a wilted smile.
translations.zh: 高大衣著考究、笑容僵滯之男子。

translations.en: "Yes?" he asks, reaching over and removing something invisible from your shoulder.
translations.zh: 「是？」他問道，伸手從汝肩頭拂去某樣看不見的東西。

translations.en: Recognizing you, his smile flickers a moment. "You have come back. Well?"
translations.zh: 他認出汝，笑容一閃即逝。「汝回來了。那呢？」

translations.en: "You've forgotten? Well, 'Your @honor' will do."
translations.zh: 「忘了？那叫我『@honor（大人）』便是。」

translations.en: He sniffs the air as if smelling something bad.
translations.zh: 他嗅了嗅空氣，彷彿聞到了什麼令人不悅的氣味。

translations.en: "I am, of course, @Trenton @Bell, the mayor."
translations.zh: 「在下當然便是@Trenton（崔頓）·@Bell（貝爾）市長。」

translations.en: "You may call me 'Your Honor'."
translations.zh: 「可稱呼我為『大人』。」

translations.en: "I would appreciate if you would use my @title, 'Your @Honor'."
translations.zh: 「請使用在下之@title（稱號）——『@Honor（大人）』，感激不盡。」

translations.en: "Yes, I am mayor."
translations.zh: 「是的，在下是市長。」

translations.en: "Yes?"
"Yes."
"Well, surely thou canst @read, yes?"
translations.zh: 「哦，汝想必能@read（閱讀），對吧？」

translations.en: "Yes, reading books is good for your spiritual side."
translations.zh: 「是的，閱讀書籍有益靈性修養。」

translations.en: "Job? I do not @labor like others."
translations.zh: 「職業？在下不似他人般@labor（勞作）。」

translations.en: "You know: @rigging the masts or swabbing the decks."
translations.zh: 「就是那種@rigging（爬桅）杆或擦甲板的活計。」

translations.en: "You aren't much of a sailor are you?"
translations.zh: 「汝似乎不怎麼懂得航海？」

translations.en: "@Yorl and that young @Delancy girl can tell you about that."
translations.zh: 「@Yorl（尤爾）和那個年輕的@Delancy（德蘭）西姑娘可以告訴汝。」

translations.en: "He works at the pier with the @Delancy girl."
translations.zh: 「他在碼頭與@Delancy（德蘭）西姑娘一同工作。」

translations.en: "She has run the pier ever since her father, @Quenton, was attacked by a @gargoyle."
translations.zh: 「自她父親@Quenton（昆頓）遭@gargoyle（魔像族）襲擊後，她便一直掌管碼頭。」

translations.en: He coughs then clears his throat.
translations.zh: 他咳了一聲，清了清嗓子。

translations.en: "@Quenton, not I, was in charge of its safe keeping."
translations.zh: 「@Quenton（昆頓）而非在下，負責保管符文。」

translations.en: "Just as I suspected, when he died, so too did our chances of finding the rune."
translations.zh: 「果不其然，他一死，尋獲符文的希望也隨之消逝。」

translations.en: "You see, he never told anyone where it was located."
translations.zh: 「汝可知，他從未告訴任何人符文藏於何處。」

translations.en: "Speak to @Horance of that."
translations.zh: 「此事可詢問@Horance（霍蘭）斯。」

translations.en: "He may be mad, but he is still quick and astute in the ways of magic."
translations.zh: 「他或許瘋癲，但在魔法之道上依然敏銳精湛。」

translations.en: "We were not friends...not good friends, that is. He resented my @position."
translations.zh: 「吾等並非朋友……至少不是好友。他對在下之@position（地位）頗有不滿。」

translations.en: "Yes, well, as mayor, I am the shepherd of the @spiritual people of this hamlet."
translations.zh: 「是的，身為市長，在下乃此村莊@spiritual（靈性）之民的牧者。」

translations.en: "We do not believe in violence as a solution to our problems."
translations.zh: 「我等不以暴力解決問題。」

translations.en: "My flock would not fight against anyone."
translations.zh: 「吾之信眾不會與任何人交戰。」

translations.en: "Therefore, I'm alarmed at the recent @gargoyle sightings."
translations.zh: 「因此，近來@gargoyle（魔像族）的出沒令在下深感憂慮。」

translations.en: "Huge fierce creatures, they are."
translations.zh: 「那些是龐大兇猛的生靈。」

translations.en: "Quenton didn't even have time to @scream before one of those beasts had killed him."
translations.zh: 「昆頓來不及@scream（呼救），便已遭那頭惡獸殺害。」

translations.en: "Many believe if he had screamed, someone in the @inn would have heard him."
translations.zh: 「許多人認為，若他呼救了，@inn（客棧）中的人定能聽見。」
translations.note: 許→避5C trail，改「許多人認為」用法可接受，'許' Big5=0xB3C許 lead=0xB3 trail=0xC3，無5C問題

translations.en: "A couple of @travelers were staying there that night, but they said they heard nothing."
translations.zh: 「那夜有兩位@travelers（旅人）住在那裡，然他們皆言未曾聽到任何聲響。」

translations.en: "Still, I find this @strange."
translations.zh: 「然在下仍覺@strange（蹊蹺）。」

translations.en: "I do not know their names."
translations.zh: 「在下不知他們的名字。」

translations.en: "'Twas @Gideon questioned them, not I."
translations.zh: 「詢問他們的是@Gideon（吉迪）恩，並非在下。」

translations.en: "He runs the @Haunting Inn."
translations.zh: 「他打理@Haunting（鬼影）旅店。」

translations.en: "The one the @travelers were at. It's across the way." He frowns at you.
translations.zh: 「@travelers（旅人）下榻之所，就在對面。」他皺眉看著汝。

translations.en: "Yes, you see, my brother is a guard for Lord British."
translations.zh: 「是的，吾弟乃不列顛王的護衛。」

translations.en: "A few months ago, a gargoyle attempted to enter the castle proper."
translations.zh: 「幾月前，一隻魔像族試圖闖入城堡正殿。」

translations.en: "He said that although they killed the beast, it's horrifying noises still give him @nightmares."
translations.zh: 「他說，雖然他們殺死了那頭惡獸，但那駭人的嘶吼至今仍令他做@nightmares（惡夢）。」

translations.en: "He keeps hearing its deep growl."
translations.zh: 「他耳邊總迴響著那低沉的咆哮聲。」

translations.en: "I'm sure that even if Quenton couldn't scream, someone would have heard that growl."
translations.zh: 「在下確信，即便昆頓無法呼救，那咆哮聲也必有人聽到。」

translations.en: "She is a peaceful woman. Very pleasant to talk to."
translations.zh: 「她是位溫和之女子，與她交談令人心曠神怡。」

translations.en: "For the life of me I've never understood a word he's ever said."
translations.zh: 「他說的話，在下從來一個字也聽不懂。」

translations.en: "They say he drank one too many potions."
translations.zh: 「都說他喝了太多藥水所致。」

translations.en: "He is a very private sort. I've never been to his abode."
translations.zh: 「他是個極為低調之人，在下從未登門拜訪過。」

translations.en: "He lives east of here, along the road to Britain."
translations.zh: 「他住在此地以東，通往不列顛城的路邊。」

translations.en: "Goodbye."
translations.zh: 「再見。」

translations.en: "I fail to see how that relates to the matter at hand..."
translations.zh: 「在下看不出此事與當下之議有何關聯……」

translations.en: "You will have to ask another of that."
translations.zh: 「此事還請另詢他人。」

translator_notes: 082 Trenton Bell: 村莊自命清高的市長，傲慢語氣。昆頓謀殺案線索重要。
